case_title: CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION VS BARTON, GEOFFREY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,785.16 FILED BY CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION AS TO DEFENDANT BARTON, GEOFFREY COPY CENTRAL (YHETTE BARTON TRUST) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO GEOFFREY BARTON (COPY CONTROL) RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COPY CENTRAL (YHETTE BARTON TRUST) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION COPY CENTRAL HASN'T FILED A NEW FICTITIOUS NAME AND CANNOT SUE. DEFT BARTON HAS BEEN REMOVED AS A STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-20-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $400.00 FILED BY BARTON, GEOFFREY COPY CENTRAL (YHETTE BARTON TRUST) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAL. EMPLOYMENT SERVICES CORP DBA CARPETCONNECTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COPY CENTRAL (YHETTE BARTON TRUST) $1,785.16 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,805.16, DEFT HAS 3 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL TO ALLOW PLTF TO REMOVE CARPET. IF DEFT DO NOT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
